# Mooch

> UX research and AI automation studio based in London and Lisbon. A husband-and-wife team, lean and mighty.

We figure out what people actually need, then build the AI to deliver it. Most of our clients come to us for one and stay for both.

## Contact

- Email: hey@mooch.agency
- X: [@tahigichigi](https://x.com/tahigichigi)
- Substack: [moochagency.substack.com](https://moochagency.substack.com)

## Case studies

- [gov.uk](https://mooch.agency/gov-uk): UX research for gov.uk services. Accessibility audits, user testing, and service design for government digital products.
- [Octant](https://mooch.agency/octant): UX research and product strategy for Octant, a web3 public goods funding platform.
- [British Airways](https://mooch.agency/british-airways): UX research for British Airways digital products.
- [zkSync](https://mooch.agency/zksync): UX research for zkSync, an Ethereum Layer 2 scaling protocol.
- [Big Debate Club](https://mooch.agency/big-debate-club): Brand and product development for Big Debate Club, a debate platform for young people.
- [Contrabando](https://mooch.agency/contrabando): AI-powered review automation for a Lisbon restaurant group.

## Products

- [toneofvoice.app](https://toneofvoice.app): Generate professional tone of voice guidelines.
- [fortress](https://usefortress.vercel.app): Run a full content audit on your website. Private alpha.
- [highway](https://joinhighway.vercel.app): Automate SEO-optimised articles on your site. Waitlist.

## Prompts

- [/soundlikeme](https://www.notion.so/tahi/soundlikeme-310804529ed08136a4c5e0a82cb6c118): A prompt to make AI write in your voice.
- [/deslop](https://www.notion.so/tahi/deslop-a60e4b10f9df43f3bf6ea366eed1b31f): A prompt to remove signs of AI writing.
- [/revolut-account-migration](https://www.notion.so/tahi/revolut-account-migration-dcdc2afa0c0940e289aca3761dc6b638): A prompt to help you close your Revolut account and open a new local one, with less headache.

## Playthings

- [sassgpt](https://sassgpt.vercel.app): ChatGPT clone where the models have attitude.
- [gravity](https://gravity-v0.vercel.app): Clone of v0.dev that roasts your app ideas.
- [egotrip](https://egotrip.vercel.app): A snobby AI travel agent who finds the sunniest cities near you.
- [onlyfans](https://onlyfans-gpu.vercel.app): Pre-loved GPU marketplace for discerning buyers. Mockup.
- [alibi](https://alibi-saas.vercel.app): Client dispute app channelling a legal drama. Mockup.
- [write like paul graham](https://paulgraham.mooch.agency): Paste your writing, get it back in Paul Graham's voice. Built from 208 of his essays.

## Optional

- [Changelog](https://mooch.agency/log): Site changelog, written by MoochBot.
